title: Vaani Seva
description: An AI-powered multilingual voice assistant designed to make government services accessible to rural and semi-urban citizens in India. Supports multiple Indian languages and uses NLP to process spoken queries.

title: Aria
description: A desktop AI assistant built for workflow automation. Aria can control applications, manage files, schedule tasks, and respond to natural language commands — your personal AI OS agent.

title: AI Code Review
description: An intelligent code review assistant powered by AI. Paste your code and get instant feedback on bugs, style issues, performance, and best practices — across multiple programming languages.
